scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: cd backend && C:/Python313/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_api.py tests/test_api_validation.py tests/test_browser_executor.py tests/test_credentials_api.py tests/test_planner.py tests/test_policy_engine.py tests/test_retrieval.py tests/test_summary.py && cd ../frontend && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:integration: cd backend && C:/Python313/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_browser_integration.py tests/test_integration_api_flows.py tests/test_live_session_api.py tests/test_voice_contract.py && cd ../frontend && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:all: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run coverage && npm run test:e2e
scripts.coverage: cd backend && C:/Python313/python.exe -m pytest && cd ../frontend && npm run test:coverage
scripts.lint: cd backend && C:/Python313/python.exe -m ruff check app tests && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
scripts.sanity: cd backend && C:/Python313/python.exe -c "import app.main, app.seed, app.services.planner, app.browser.executor, app.voice.session, app.live.runtime" && cd ../frontend && npm run build
